title: Chris Thorman
description: English rugby league footballer and coach
extract:
Christopher Thorman (born 26 September 1980) is an English professional rugby league coach who is an assistant coach at the York Knights in the Super League, the former head coach of the Newcastle Thunder and a former professional rugby league footballer. 
An England international goal-kicking stand-off, he previously played in the Super League for Hull FC, Huddersfield Giants, London Broncos and the Sheffield Eagles, as well as in the National Rugby League for the Parramatta Eels. Following the sacking of Rick Stone as coach of the Huddersfield Giants, he was announced as interim head coach.
